title: Kalneh #3641
definition:
Calneh or Calno = "fortress of Anu"

 1) a city of Babylonia named among the cities of Nimrod
    1a) maybe modern 'Niffer'
 2) an Assyrian city near Aleppo
    2a) maybe same as 1 since it was captured by Assyria in the 8th
        century BC
